title: panic in `debugTraceTopNRange` when plan replayer is collecting information
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
create table t (a int);
insert into t value(1),(2),(3);
analyze table t;
plan replayer dump explain analyze select * from t where a < -1;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

plan replayed works normally

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [-1]
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a Int32, b String, c Date);
CREATE TABLE t2 (d Int32, e Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY d;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a < -1 OR b IS NULL;
key_bug_features: plan replayer dump with invalid range condition
